response.justification: The candidate has 17+ years of solid software engineering experience across a wide range of technologies and domains, and demonstrates genuine breadth as a polyglot developer with some open-source founding experience. However, the role is a director-level individual contributor position requiring demonstrated AI expertise, cloud platform strategy, and customer/partner advisory capabilities at scale. The candidate's AI exposure is limited to roughly one year in the current role (MCP tooling and agentic workflows), with no evidence of AI-powered products shipped at scale, no cloud platform depth, no history of advising strategic customers or shaping technology direction across organizations, and no advanced degree in an AI-adjacent field. The gap between a strong senior individual contributor and the seniority, AI depth, and strategic influence this role demands is too wide to bridge.
strengths: 17+ years of consistent software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, demonstrating genuine technical longevity and adaptability
Founded and maintained GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and used by real NGO customers, showing entrepreneurial execution
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, indicating early positioning in the agentic tooling space
concerns: AI experience is confined to approximately one year in the current role; no demonstrated AI products or platforms built and shipped at meaningful scale prior to 2025
No evidence of cloud platform strategy, customer advisory, or the kind of cross-organizational technical leadership the director-level IC scope requires
Career arc and titles (Senior/Staff Software Developer) indicate a strong individual contributor track, not the strategic influence and external thought leadership the role explicitly demands
